data.summary: [Daily Quest with Game Development Department] Event Missions in celebration of the new main story u
data.body:
[Daily Quest with Game Development Department]

Event Missions in celebration of the new main story update have begun!
Clear Daily Quests to earn various rewards!
Period: 12/14 (Tue) - 1/11 (Tue) Before Maintenance
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/95529
